creator: kuriyakk@cpf.navy.mil
text:
Under 3.4-RELEASE, the 3C589D card is not recognized
by the floppy installation process.  The card should be recognized as
device 'zp' but is not.  It is interesting to note that this card is
recognized by 3.3-RELEASE under the same hardware environment.

Fix: 

Wish I knew.
How-To-Repeat: Install 3.3-RELEASE from floppy - 3C589D card is correctly
recognized.  Install 3.4-RELEASE from floppy - 3C589D card
is not detected.
